violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. No person trained in food safety was present during time of inspection. A person trained in food safety must be present anytime food is prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2026
Food items were observed stored on the floor in the walk in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026

The non food contact surfaces of the 3 bay sink was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the grill prep unit and the sandwich prep unit. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026

The non-food contact surfaces behind the ice cream case have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-Food contact surfaces must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2026
The hood system was observed with an excess of debris. Hood systems must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the prep unit, and low boy. Gaskets must be maintained in good condition. New Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2025
The establishment is lacking drain stoppers for the three bay sink. Establishment must purchase drain stoppers. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025
The screens on the hood system were observed with an excess of debris. The hood systems must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 01/17/2025
The hand-washing sink at the counter was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/03/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/03/2024
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/03/2024

Thermometers are lacking in refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024

The door to the outside, located at the back of the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2024

The cutting board of the prep unit is very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2024
